name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl
notes:
This building block detects a suspicious curl process start with user agent.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Curl Change User Agents - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious curl process start on linux with set useragent options


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [curl or curl.exe]
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -a %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --user-agent %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Agent Changed via Curl on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [curl or curl.exe]
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -a %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --user-agent %') AQL filter query
